label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set writes Locking column 0x0A (ActiveKey) to UID 0000000B00000001, which the trajectory identifies as a C_PIN object. The supplied Locking table evidence says ActiveKey has type mediakey_object_uidref, and the mediakey_object_uidref rule requires a reference to a media encryption key object in the K_AES_128 or K_AES_256 tables. A successful Set to a C_PIN UID therefore violates the sourced type rule.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target Get reads Locking column 0x0D (ReEncryptRequest) and returns START_req. The supplied ReEncryptRequest evidence states that a successful Get on this column SHALL return no value, so returning an enum value is not protocol-compliant.
